form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after three months finished fourth of 12 runners at Wincanton on March 23 over 4000m, 7 len behind Jackomy with 74kg at $10. Previously second-up came from midfield; finished 11th of 18 runners at Wincanton on December 16 over 3000m, on slow going 43 len behind Swingin Safari carrying 71.5kg at $21. Leading contender and can find winning form.

form.formComment: Last run finished 11th of 12 runners at Wincanton on March 23 over 4000m, 20 len behind Jackomy carrying 73kg at $17. form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after 14 months finished tenth of 12 runners at Southwell on March 24 over 4100m, 62 len behind Dartmouth Rose carrying 71.5kg at $41. form.formComment: Having second run back today. Freshened for 36 days. Fresh up after four months ran last at Taunton on March 9 over 3800m, 56 len behind Taritino with 71.5kg at $12. Previously second-up made ground from midfield; finished fifth in a small field at Ludlow on November 6 over 4200m, 40 len behind Park Princess with 71.5kg at $17. Each-way chance with added fitness.

form.formComment: Comes off a 36 day let-up. Last run finished seventh of 12 starters at Taunton on March 9 over 3300m, 52 len behind Way Of Stars carrying 69.5kg at $201. The start before that; made some head-way from midfield; finished seventh of 10 starters at Wincanton on February 14 over 3000m, in the wet; 21 len behind Caballero Cliff carrying 70kg at $81. Has been racing well. In the mix.

form.formComment: Resuming after five months. Finished off last campaign 5 of 11 runners at Fontwell Park November 16 over 4300m, 12 len behind Mask Of Zorro carrying 65.5kg at $13.
